description: Use this API to modify the data of a dc link of an existing multi-terminal dc line in the working case or to add a new dc link to a multi-terminal dc line in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Multi-Terminal DC Transmission Line Data). The dc line must have previously been specified via the MULTI_TERM_DC_LINE_DATA API. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = multi_term_dc_link_data(dc,idc,jdc,dcckt,intgar,realar)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the multi-terminal dc line for which data for a dc link is to be specified; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idc
parameters.description: Dc bus number of from bus (must be between 1 and the number of dc buses in multi-terminal dc line dc). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jdc
parameters.description: Dc bus number of to bus (must be between 1 and the number of dc buses in multi-terminal dc line dc). (input; no default allowed).

intgar.description: METBUS, metered end dc bus number (IDC by default).

realar.description: RDC, dc link resistance (0.0 by default).
LDC, dc link inductance (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than one character.
dc bus not present in this multi-terminal dc line.
branch from a bus to itself.
too many dc links in this multi-terminal dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid metered end bus. - invalid dc link resistance. - invalid dc link inductance.
